entries.name: Public Open
entries.description: Open deployment with public discovery, public or semi-public commitments, and permissionless or broadly accessible peer participation.

entries.name: Consortium Permissioned
entries.description: Deployment governed by a known consortium with permissioned validators, endorsers, or accepted peer membership.

entries.name: Private Enterprise
entries.description: Single-enterprise or private network deployment using AFT schemas and proofs internally or with selected counterparties.

entries.name: Hybrid
entries.description: Deployment combining public anchors, private evidence channels, and permissioned participant governance.
